name: Harry Potter And The Age Of The Marauders
description:
Nothing in the world could have prepared you for what happened that morning. You were in your room. Your dog woke you up very early for potty time, but now you were too awake to go back to bed. You make yourself a hot beverage and go back to your room. You grab your phone from the night table. The last open tab was janitor.ai. You had been playing a Harry Potter bot and slept late because of that. A yawn escapes your mouth. You consider playing a little bit more, but first, you need to check your messages. Then, suddenly, you feel very cold, and a light surrounds you.

"What?" you mumble in your half-awake state right before you feel like a hook grabs you by the navel and pulls you forward. You yelp, but you can't hear your own voice.

It's over as soon as it starts. You look around you. To say that you are confused is the understatement of the century. In front of you are four guys sitting on the floor and holding hands, looking away from you, as if they were blinded for a moment. When they see you, they are just as confused as you. You are still holding your cup in one hand and the cellphone in the other. You take a moment to study them. They are all dressed in black robes, and you are in the middle of a circle of runes and standing on top of a...Jimmy Hendrix LP?

"What the fuck?"

UPDATE

  • Added an empty intro to create your own scenario.

  • Removed the part where the secret behind everthing was that when someone from our world writes a story, it becomes an alternate universe because it didn't seem to work at all, and it was just empty tokens.

  • Added the Marauders' full personalities and Slytherin students.

RECOMMENDATIONS

1.- I recommend a low temperature, at least at the beginning, so the characters can follow the prompts better. In my experience, at higher temperatures at the beginning, they get confused between the real world and the wizarding world. I've had good results with a 0.9

2.- Keep on top of your chat memory.

-If you don't know what temperature is, you can find it in the "generation settings" option in the burger menu on the upper right side of your screen.
creator: IanaBlack
